selected_goal: Add summary buckets for suspicious rendered-crop dimension findings in the output-integrity audit.
why_this_now: Iterations 1-3 added stronger gates. The live audit now consistently reports 31 suspicious dimension candidates, but reviewers need deterministic buckets by image kind, reason, and paper to prioritize inspection.
repo_evidence: .agent-runs/2026-06-19T08-10-11-928Z/iteration-03/audit.current.integrity.json shows 31 suspicious_rendered_crop_dimensions and no duplicate/path-role failures.
.agent-loop/project-gates.md requires sampled visual evidence for crop-related work; summaries help choose the right samples.
src/exam_bank/audit.py already has the candidate evidence list needed to build summaries without another scan.
acceptance_criteria: The summary includes counts by image kind and reason.
The summary includes deterministic top paper buckets and max height/aspect-ratio examples for prioritization.
test_expectations: Extend the suspicious dimension test to assert summary buckets and max examples.
implementation_boundaries: Do not create a new review-pack command in this iteration.
Do not inspect image contents beyond the dimensions already collected.
repo_hygiene_risk: Low. This only enriches an existing audit report.
rollback_plan: Remove the summary helper, report field, and added assertions.
done_when: Targeted tests pass and the live audit report includes prioritization summary for suspicious dimensions.
